series_metadata.series_description: Contains all proprietary information from the regulated industrial/agricultural entity. May also contain handwritten notes, phone memorandums and related information of a confidential nature.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: Continually maintain and update microfilm in operating area ; Paper: in operating area five years data deemed not useful. Microfilm data that is deemed use- ful and hardcopy microfilm has been checked quality and completeness
